principle: Vocal phrase boundaries decide lip-sync video boundaries. Do not cut lip-sync audio from arbitrary video windows.

boundary_evidence.whisper_no_prompt: previous phrase ends before this window; target phrase starts here
boundary_evidence.energy_check: start excludes previous-line tail; end leaves vocal tail/emotion hold

phrases.selection_reason: Complete final vocal phrase; excludes previous-line tail; safe for one Seedance lip-sync shot.

seedance.final_audio_policy: Use master song in final mix. Seedance generated audio is diagnostic only.
